## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #12". Delete if not applicable. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run --group tests python -m pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `uv run --group ruff ruff check src tests` is clean
- [ ] Docs updated if public API changed (`uv run sphinx-build -b html docs docs/_build/html`)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change (named `*_tests.py`)
